creator: hsu@clinet.fi
text:
sup ending 21:51 GMT 28th was very unstable at least on a news
	server.  After upgrading the kernel we had 3 crashes during
	the same day and switched back to previous sup.

	Unfortunately I did not get dumps from these (lacking disk
	space on var).

	We are using mmap in Innd.  Previous sups from about one month
	earlier were somewhat better (uptimes on average around 4-6 days).

How-To-Repeat: 
	I would try running a news server with mmap, but I'm not sure
	if that would be the real cause.
